subcodes.first_line: O beloved of God! The winds of trial have indeed swept over you from the direction of your Lord, the Most Merciful, in this year [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا احباء الله قد مرت علیکم اریاح الامتحان عن شطر ربکم الرحمن فی سنه
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
